历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 11277 → 13521 → 12881 → 17484 → 20739, showing a significant overall downward trend, with a cumulative decline of about 7858 places in the last 3 years. The 2025 baseline is about 20739. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 42 in 2021, 41 in 2022, 44 in 2023, 46 in 2024, and 52 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 50, a reduction of about 3.85% compared to 2025, a relatively small reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 70th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, with recent rankings stable in the 64-70 range. The reputation evaluation during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is somewhat negative, mainly involving a plagiarism accusation against Associate Professor Jia Qianqian from the School of Literature. The university has established a special working group to investigate, which has a certain inhibitory effect on application psychology. Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 81st, with an average evaluation and low short video exposure. Geology A, Archaeology A, Software Engineering A-, among which Software Engineering A- is related to Physics Category majors such as Computer Science and Electronic Information, attracting some candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Among the Physics Category enrollment majors, Computer Science has high social popularity and is highly recommended, Electronics/Communication is highly recommended, Clinical Medicine is highly recommended, Electrical Engineering and Automation is highly recommended, while Chemical and Pharmaceutical, Food Science and Engineering have average social popularity. The total number of candidates in the province for the 2026 college entrance examination is about 474,900, with the Physics Category proportion estimated at about 56.4% based on recent years, approximately 267,900, a slight increase from 2025. Northwest University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, and is a cross-provincial enrollment. The university's Physics Category enrollment plan in Jiangxi has gradually increased from 42 in 2021 to 52 in 2025, with a slight decrease to 50 in 2026, but the overall enrollment scale remains high.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous significant downward trend in historical rankings, the small reduction in the 2026 plan (-3.85%), the negative reputation suppressing application enthusiasm, a slight increase in provincial candidates, and sustained popularity of hot engineering majors, based on the 2025 baseline of 20739, the reduction effect and candidate increase basically offset each other, and the negative reputation slightly cools competition. The estimated minimum ranking is about 20311, with a range of 19811-20811.

If your ranking is near the upper limit (>20811), it is recommended to mainly apply for Tier 3 majors as a safe choice.
